case_title: RODNEY M FULTZ VS. RIAN VANDERMADEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERMADEN, RIAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-09-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RODNEY M FULTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RIAN VANDERMADEN IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1797 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 5 PAYMENTS OF $300 WITH THE SIXTH AND FINAL PAYMENT OF $297. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE NO LATER THAN JUNE 3RD AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 3RD OF EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG-09TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED TO THE RESOLVE DATE OF DECEMBER 2022. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THAT DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,464.00 FILED BY FULTZ, RODNEY M AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERMADEN, RIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULTZ, RODNEY M AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERMADEN, RIAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-09-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1797 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 5 PAYMENTS OF $300 WITH THE SIXTH AND FINAL PAYMENT OF $297. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE NO LATER THAN JUNE 3RD AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 3RD OF EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER. NO APPEARANCES MADE THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO THE RESOLVE DATE OF DECEMBER 09, 2022. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THAT DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
